name: ColabDesign Fixed Backbone
description: Generate sequences to match an input structure via reversing AlphaFold. Produce similar structures to the input structure, with de novo sequences. Keep/Fix parts of the sequences produced and design the rest.
capabilities: Generate sequences to match an input structure via reversing AlphaFold
Produce similar structures to the input structure, with de novo sequences
Keep/Fix parts of the sequences produced and design the rest

pdbFile.description: Input protein structure in PDB format to design sequences for

fixedPositions.description: Residue positions to keep fixed during design

numDesigns.description: Number of sequence designs to generate
